metadata.title: Surprise 2v1 Defense on A Site – Quick Reflexes Win the Round
metadata.description:
Caught them pushing hard on A with fast reactions and sharp aim. Timing and positioning made all the difference here. What’s your favorite spot to hold tight?

Share your best clutch moment in the comments!
